steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS VALUE, DFP_GROUP FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '02.998.611/0001-04' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE = (SELECT MAX(ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE) FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '02.998.611/0001-04') GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, DFP_GROUP ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, COMPANY_NAME, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '02.998.611/0001-04' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC LIMIT 3"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"price = 31.91
shares_outstanding = 658_883_304
market_cap = price * shares_outstanding
ativo_total = 45_643_761_000
disponibilidades = 719_176_000
ativo_circ = 7_065_287_000
passivo_circ = 1_583_102_000
patrim_liq = 21_395_868_000
receita_liquida_12m = 8_962_856_000
custo_bens_vendidos = -5_171_783_000
lucro_bruto = 3_791_073_000
despesas_operacionais = 442_084_000
despesas_gerais_adm = 100_152_000
resultado_liquido = 2_562_578_000
ebit = 3_248_837_000
dep_amort_exa = 25_631_000
# Derived
grosos_margem = lucro_bruto / receita_liquida_12m
operating_margin = (lucro_bruto - abs(despesas_operacionais) - despesas_gerais_adm) / receita_liquida_12m
# We'll compute using sign: EBIT approx gross - operating_exp (sum  desp ops) - admin; treat dep/amort as part of EBIT? We'll keep ebit as 3_248_837_000
roi_roic_denom = ativo_total - 209_410_000 - disponibilidades
capex = dep_amort_exa
ma = market_cap
print('Market cap:', market_cap)
print('ROE', (resultado_liquido) / (patrim_liq))
# per share metrics
lpa = lucro_liquido = 2_562_578_000/ shares_outstanding
vpa = patr_liq_per_share = patrim_liq / shares_outstanding
psr = price / (receita_liquida_12m / shares_outstanding)
p_s = price / (receita_liquida_12m / shares_outstanding)
# compute some indicators
lpa = 2_562_578_000 / shares_outstanding
print('LPA', lpa)
print('VPA', patrim_liq / shares_outstanding)
print('Margins gross', lucro_bruto/receita_liquida_12m)
print('EBIT', ebit, 'per share', ebit / shares_outstanding)
print('P/L', price / lpa)
print('P/VP', price / (patrim_liq / shares_outstanding))
print('P/EBIT', price / (ebit / shares_outstanding))
print('PSR', price / (receita_liquida_12m / shares_outstanding))
print('P/Ativos', price / (ativo_total / shares_outstanding))
print('Giro ativos', receita_liquida_12m / ativo_total)
# EV
outstanding = shares_outstanding
market_cap = price * outstanding
debt_bruta = 4_464_140_000 + 14_372_079_000
ev = market_cap + debt_bruta - disponibilidades
print('Debt brut', debt_bruta)
print('EV', ev)
print('EV/EBITDA', ev / (ebit + dep_amort_exa))
print('EV/EBIT', ev / ebit)
"} }
